sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79498" key="pareudiasth/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παρευδῐ-αστής</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦ</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, of a kind of water-fowl <sense id="n79498.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">that comes on land in fine weather</tr_>, prob. for <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">παρευδιστ-</foreign>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1270.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Clearch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
